description:
## Background

`bsm-kia.13` extracts redeclared typed-RPC interfaces, lambdas,
DOM helpers, and inline sidebar selectors from per-spec copies
into two helper modules. Once both expands (`bsm-kia.13.1`) land,
every spec can switch to importing the helpers in a single
per-directory batch.

This sub-issue covers the migration for all four specs in one
batch:
- `e2e/issue-list/issue-list.success.spec.ts`
- `e2e/issue-list/issue-list.empty.spec.ts`
- `e2e/issue-list/issue-list.restoration.spec.ts`
- `e2e/issue-list/issue-list.atomic-switch.spec.ts`

## What to build

Replace every local declaration of the affected interfaces,
lambdas, helpers, and inline sidebar selectors in the four specs
above with imports from `e2e/issue-list/helpers/rpc.ts` and
`e2e/issue-list/helpers/sidebar.ts`. The specs' behavior and
assertions stay byte-for-byte equivalent; only the source of the
helpers and selectors changes.

## Technical Approach

- Add an import for `e2e/issue-list/helpers/rpc.ts` at the top
  of each spec.
- Add an import for `e2e/issue-list/helpers/sidebar.ts` at the
  top of each spec.
- In each spec, delete:
  - Local declarations of `interface WorkspaceSwitchResponse`,
    `interface WorkspaceStateResponse`,
    `invokeTypedWorkspaceSwitch`, `invokeWorkspaceState`,
    `issueRowSelector`, `expectIssueVisible`.
  - Local declarations of `expectSidebarWorkspacePath` and
    `expectSidebarWorkspaceAbsent` (where present).
  - Any literal selector string of the form
    `[aria-label='Workspace'] ...`.
  - Any local `p.text-muted` / `p.truncate` selector literal.
- Update any spec-local `arguments_: object` typed signature to
  match the helper's canonical signature (one signature across
  all callers — no `Record<string, unknown>` drift).
- Replace each call site with the corresponding import
  (`expectCurrentWorkspace`, `expectNoCurrentWorkspace`, or
  `expectRememberedWorkspace`).
- Leave the WebDriverIO imports (`browser`, `$`, `before`,
  etc.) untouched.

## Considerations

- Local copies may have drifted from each other; pick the
  canonical signature from the helper module, not from any one
  spec.
- If a spec has type-only usages of an interface (e.g.,
  `Promise<WorkspaceSwitchResponse>`), keep them but import the
  type from the helper.
- Doing all four specs in one commit is acceptable because each
  spec's E2E scenario is independent and
  `pnpm e2e:issue-list:complete` proves end-to-end green at the
  directory boundary.
- The existing local copies stay as dead code through this
  step; they are removed by `bsm-kia.13.3`.

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] Each of the four specs imports the helpers from
      `e2e/issue-list/helpers/rpc.ts` and
      `e2e/issue-list/helpers/sidebar.ts`.
- [ ] No local declaration of any helper exported by either
      helper module remains in any spec.
- [ ] No `[aria-label='Workspace']` / `p.truncate` /
      `p.text-muted` selector literal remains in any spec.
- [ ] Each spec's `it()` count, assertion count, and behavior
      match the previous version exactly.
- [ ] `rg "interface WorkspaceSwitchResponse|interface WorkspaceStateResponse|invokeTypedWorkspaceSwitch|invokeWorkspaceState|issueRowSelector|expectIssueVisible|expectSidebarWorkspacePath|expectSidebarWorkspaceAbsent|\[aria-label='Workspace'\]|p\.truncate|p\.text-muted" e2e/issue-list/*.spec.ts`
      returns zero hits (note: local copies may still exist as
      dead code at this stage; they are removed in
      `bsm-kia.13.3`).

## Test Plan

- Run `pnpm test` and `pnpm exec ultracite check` — both must
  pass.
- Run `pnpm e2e:issue-list:complete` to prove all four
  scenarios pass end to end.
- Run `pnpm e2e:issue-list:isolation` to prove the order-changed
  matrix still passes.
title: Migrate all four specs to helpers/rpc.ts and helpers/sidebar.ts
